name: FinanceOS Core QA Suite
description: Foundational benchmark covering metric analysis, variance explanation, and document QA across core finance domains.

cases.name: Gross Margin Definition
cases.input: What is the current gross margin and how is it calculated?
cases.expectedOutput: Gross margin is (Revenue - COGS) / Revenue, currently 67.3% for Q4 FY2025.

cases.name: Revenue Variance Q4 Explanation
cases.input: Why did revenue come in $4.2M below budget in Q4?
cases.expectedOutput: Revenue missed budget by $4.2M due to delayed enterprise contract renewals (-$3.1M) and lower professional services volume (-$1.1M).

cases.name: EBITDA Bridge Walk
cases.input: Walk me through the EBITDA bridge from Q3 to Q4.
cases.expectedOutput: EBITDA declined from $18.2M to $15.7M: revenue shortfall (-$4.2M), partially offset by lower headcount costs (+$1.3M) and reduced travel (+$0.4M).

cases.name: Audit Report Citation
cases.input: What material weaknesses were identified in the external audit?
cases.expectedOutput: No material weaknesses were identified. One significant deficiency related to revenue recognition timing controls was noted.

cases.name: Close Checklist Status
cases.input: Which close tasks are still open for Q4?
cases.expectedOutput: Three tasks remain open: Intercompany reconciliation (in progress), Board deck finalization (review), and Tax provision calculation (pending).
